title: Thionyl Fluoride
body:
Never was able to decide between FO and SO? Wanted both features of very high fps and qol features at the same time? SF2O is your solution! This modpack was made by first making an SO base with all mods and Its configs and then adding FO mods and configs while keeping SO not overriden. Then made some changes to juice even more fps out of the game while keeping it nice and cool. Below you can find my fps tests by using Sodium Extra's average fps display (F3 menu consumes A LOT of fps). This also meant that I had to manually add Sodium Extra to SO, but Im pretty sure that didn't change the final mark by a lot.

FO => 2618fps                       
SO => 3259fps                          
SF2O => 2892fps                        

as you can see, SF2O gives you 200fps more than FO and 400fps less than SO and If you think about it, that 400fps loss is worth it since you don't kill game aesthetics at least.
